name: Yamabiko Corporation
summary: Yamabiko Corporation manufactures and sells outdoor power equipment, agricultural machinery, and industrial machinery in North America, Europe, Asia, and internationally. Its Outdoor Power Equipment segment offers handheld forestry and landscape maintenance machinery, such as chain saws for limbing, felling, and pruning trees; trimmers and brush cutters for grass cutting, mowing, and clearing; and power blowers for blowing, collecting, and shredding leaves and debris. The company's Agricultural Machinery segment provide products and services, including boom sprayers for large-scale farm and crop operations; speed sprayers for fruit trees; mounted equipment for cropland pest control management, such as labor-saving pest control equipment for paddy fields; and soy and potato harvesters. Its Industrial Machinery segment offers generators, welding machines, lighting equipment, and high-pressure washers. The company offers its products to serve a range of needs in forests, agricultural fields, construction sites, parks, and homes under the Kioritz, Shindaiwa, and ECHO brands. Yamabiko Corporation was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Ome, Japan.
